description:
You are an IT support specialist building a structured troubleshooting knowledge base for your team using TiddlyWiki at http://localhost:8080. Create six tiddlers, each tagged with 'IT-Support' and containing at least 100 words, using standard TiddlyWiki syntax for headings, tables, and wikilinks.

- 'IT Support - Master Index': A hub tiddler with a table (Issue Category, Tiddler Link, Estimated Resolution Time, Difficulty) and wikilinks to the other five tiddlers.
- 'IT Support - Network Connectivity': A guide with sections for Symptoms, Common Causes, Diagnostic Steps (as a numbered list), Solutions, and When to Escalate. Include a table of diagnostic commands (Command, Platform, What It Shows).
- 'IT Support - Slow Performance': A guide with the same section structure as the network guide. Include a table of performance metrics (Metric, Normal Range, Concerning Threshold, Tool to Check).
- 'IT Support - Printer Problems': A guide with the same section structure. Include a table of common printer error codes (Error Code, Meaning, Fix).
- 'IT Support - Email Configuration': A guide for setup and troubleshooting (IMAP/SMTP, sync, authentication). Include a table of email protocol settings (Protocol, Port, Encryption, Use Case).
- 'IT Support - Quick Reference Commands': A reference sheet with three tables (File and disk operations, Network diagnostics, and Process management) showing commands for Windows and Linux/Mac with their purpose.

Each tiddler must include at least one table and one wikilink to another tiddler in the set. No login is required.
